series_metadata.series_description: Preliminary and official statements or similar documents relating to an issue of municipal securities expected to be issued.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: If issued, retain until maturity and then transfer to State Archives. If of no historical value to State Archives, destroy. If not issued, retain for two complete years, then destroy. ; Paper: If issued, retain until maturity and then transfer to State Archives. If of no historical value to State Archives, destroy. If not issued, retain for two complete years, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Archives
